descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-2 to win Centennial Cup championship.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes won the Centennial Cup Tier II Junior A hockey championship on Saturday night, defeating the Humboldt Broncos 5-2 in Humboldt, Saskatchewan. Jason Phillips scored three goals to lead the Sockeyes. Goaltender Frank Romeo was named tournament MVP after an outstanding performance, facing 46 shots while his teammates managed only 23. Richmond skated to period leads of 2-0 and 2-1.

attribution.headline: Goaltender brilliant as Sockeyes win Centennial Cup
